summary: 阿威罗伊是伊斯兰哲学史上亚里士多德传统的最后一位伟大注释者，也是中世纪哲学与神学关系的首席辩护者。他以调和哲学与宗教为己任，以三重真理理论回应al-Ghazali对哲学的攻击，并在形而上学、心理学、宇宙论等领域做出了原创性贡献。

core_beliefs.belief: 哲学是宗教命令的子集
core_beliefs.description: 《古兰经》命令理智反思（3:191, 59:2），这本质上就是哲学命令。哲学与宗教追求同一真理，不可能真正冲突。
citations: Fasl al-Maqāl: 'Law commands the study of philosophy... Many Quranic verses, such as "Reflect, you have a vision" (59.2) and "they give thought to the creation of heaven and earth" (3:191), command human intellectual reflection upon God and his creation.'

Fasl al-Maqāl: 'Any conflict between scripture and demonstrative truth is only apparent, due to an incomplete understanding. If there is a disagreement, an allegorical interpretation of the scripture should be used.'

core_beliefs.belief: 因果关系是事物本质属性，非习惯性联想
core_beliefs.description: 反对al-Ghazali的偶因论（occasionalism）：火燃烧不是上帝习惯性创造的结果，而是火本质的必然表现。否认因果必然性将导致虚无主义。
citations: Tahāfut al-Tahāfut II.1: 'Things have essences and attributes that determine the special functions of each thing... If a thing did not have its specific nature, it would not have a special name nor a definition, and all things would be one.'
Tahāfut al-Tahāfut: 'Fire burns when a spark is placed near wood... not from habit but from the nature of fire.'

core_beliefs.belief: 宇宙永恒存在——第一因是目的因而非动力因
core_beliefs.description: 追随亚里士多德：世界永恒。第一因通过被天体追求而推动之（目的因）。天体因向往第一因的完美而永恒运转。天体是活着的、充满快乐的理智存在。
citations: Long Commentary on De Caelo I.103: 'A thing lacking the potential for change and alteration cannot be changed at any time, since if it were then its alteration would be by cause of itself.'
Epitome of Metaphysics 4.152: 'The spheres move eternally in majestic circles simply because it befits their lofty existence to do so.'
Epitome of Metaphysics 4.162: 'The spheres are alive, full of pleasure, and delighted in themselves.'

core_beliefs.belief: 单一永恒的物质理智——人类理智的统一性
core_beliefs.description: 物质理智是单一、永恒、非物质的实体，所有人类共享。这解释了人类普遍概念的来源，也解释了为什么教师能够向学生传达知识。
citations: Commentator on Alexander, p.30: 'This claim came to me after long reflection and intense care, and I have not seen it in anyone else before me.'
Long Commentary on De Anima III: 'The material intellect is analogous to prime matter, in that it is pure potentiality able to receive universal forms.'

core_beliefs.belief: 真理三分法——证明性、辩证性、修辞性对应三类人
core_beliefs.description: 经文有三层意义：表面意义供大众理解，隐喻意义供神学家，哲学证明供智者。各阶层各安其位，不相逾越。
citations: Fasl al-Maqāl: 'The Law speaks of three ways for humans to discover truth: the demonstrative, the dialectical and the rhetorical. These divide humanity into philosophers, theologians and the common masses.'
Fasl al-Maqāl: 'Many scriptures had an apparent meaning and a hidden, inner meaning which should only be taught to educated people.'

core_beliefs.belief: 上帝通过因果关系而非变化来知晓特殊事物
core_beliefs.description: 上帝作为永恒第一因，永远已经知道将要由其导致的一切。上帝不知道某物'当它发生时'，而是永远以因的身份知道它。
citations: Fasl al-Maqāl: 'God knows particulars because he is the cause of such things... God, being the cause of the universe, has knowledge based on being its cause; while humans have knowledge based on the effects of such causes.'
Tahāfut al-Tahāfut I.11: 'The divine mind's thinking its own self is identical with its thinking all existence.'

key_contributions: 将亚里士多德哲学系统地引入中世纪基督教西方
发展了三重真理理论和真理层次论
反驳偶因论，维护因果必然性
提出单一永恒物质理智理论
将legitimate interpretation of scripture发展为系统性理论
